name: authsome-mcp-proxy
summary: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) proxy that adds an OAuth/OIDC frontend to upstream MCPs that don't include any such — either because they only validate tokens or expect static credentials such as API keys. Bridges to a configurable IdP (Keycloak, AWS Cognito, Google, Azure, generic OIDC) for Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Claude.ai.
